name: mcp-database-tools-design
question: How should MCP database tools be structured?
decision: Three new tools in db.* namespace: db.connect (establish connection, store in MCP state), db.migrate (execute DDL from schema via generateSQL + BunSqlExecutor), db.query (raw SQL for power users). Follow existing registerXxx pattern with ArkType params.
rationale: Consistent with existing MCP tool patterns. Connection state managed in packages/mcp/src/state.ts alongside existing schema/store state. db.migrate leverages existing DDL generator.
